title: PROMISED 11 MILLION DEPORTATIONS. DELIVERED 1.5 MILLION.
title_alt: TRUMP DEPORTED FEWER PEOPLE THAN OBAMA'S FIRST TERM
11M vs 1.5M — THE ICE RECEIPT TRUMP VOTERS DON'T HEAR
description:
The 2016 trail target: deport every undocumented immigrant — about 11 million people. The actual deliverable across four years: ~1.5 million ICE removals. Lower than Obama's first term (~2.5 million).

Not because Obama was tougher — because the 11 million number was never operationally possible. The book grades it BROKEN on the math, not on the intent.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=deportation

#politics #immigration #trump #shorts #factcheck
